T-009.dispatchPrompt:
# Stage A0 - Extract Source Text and Metadata

## Context
- paper_id: A2
- workflow_root: /Users/chengren17/.openclaw/projects/paper-xhs-3min-workflow
- run_dir: /Users/chengren17/xhs-share/A2
- pdf_path: /Users/chengren17/.openclaw/projects/paper-xhs-3min-workflow/pdfs/A2.pdf

## Inputs
- Primary source PDF: /Users/chengren17/.openclaw/projects/paper-xhs-3min-workflow/pdfs/A2.pdf

## Required Outputs
- /Users/chengren17/xhs-share/A2/artifacts/a0-extract/raw-text.md
- /Users/chengren17/xhs-share/A2/artifacts/a0-extract/metadata.json
- /Users/chengren17/xhs-share/A2/artifacts/a0-extract/extract-log.txt

## Acceptance Criteria
- Raw text includes title, abstract, and all section headings from the PDF.
- metadata.json includes paper_id, title, authors, venue, and year fields.
- Extraction log records any OCR or parsing fallback used.

## Verification And Evidence Requirements
- Run and report a line-count check for raw-text.md.
- Include one evidence item that references metadata.json and one that references extract-log.txt.

## JSON Output Schema (MUST return exactly one JSON object)
```json
{
  "taskId": "<task-id>",
  "agent": "<agent-role>",
  "status": "done|blocked|progress",
  "summary": "one-line outcome",
  "changes": [
    {
      "path": "<file-or-dir-path>",
      "summary": "what changed"
    }
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "<verification command output / file path / link>"
  ],
  "risks": [
    "<risk or empty string>"
  ],
  "nextActions": [
    "<next action or empty string>"
  ]
}
```
